text:
君が身につけてきた技術は本物だ。
君にとってガンスラッシュは
唯一無二の相棒となったことだろう。

今回の課題は、これまでの
総仕上げとも言うべき内容だ！
一筋縄では行かないぞ。

では始めるとしよう！
見せてくれたまえ、君の成長し

These skills you've honed are the real deal.
Look at your Gunblade. It's become practically
a trusted partner to you, wouldn't you say?

Consider your next challenge a kind of
capstone. It'll go over everything you've
learned this whole time. "Good enough"
won't cut it.

So let's get started. Show me how far you've
come, operative!
